title: brauneria angustifolia
intro: Brauneria angustifolia, also known as Brauneria, is a plant species native to South America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved digestion. Brauneria angustifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make herbal remedies.
